---
title: Create a title
author:
  - name: Christina Fan
    affiliations:
        - id: p390
          department: Department of Psychology
          name: University of Waterloo
  - name: Daniella Christina Pereira Cisorio
    affiliations:
        - ref: p390
  - name: Alexia Nijgorodov
    affiliations:
        - ref: p390
  - name: Diya Renjan
    affiliations:
        - ref: p390
abstract: |
  Add short abstract here
keywords:
  - Add keywords
  - Keyword 2
bibliography: bibliography.bib 
format:
  elsevier-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    journal:
      name: Journal Name
      formatting: preprint
      cite-style: authoryear
---

# Introduction





# Methods




# Results




# Discussion




# References {-}

::: {#refs}
:::
